sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the image, the bottom-right grid now shows:
- Row 0: R b b
- Row 1: R [pattern] R
- Row 2: b b R
This matches the bottom-left grid pattern! But the level is not completed. Maybe I need to match a different pattern?
Let me check the current state and try the top-right pattern.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
# Check current bottom-right grid
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ['b', 'R'] and n['pixels'] == 36:
        b = n['boundary']
        min_r = min(p[0] for p in b)
        min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
        if min_r >= 36 and min_c >= 36:
            print(n['id'], n['color'], min_r, min_c)
</parameter>
<parameter=world_model>
{"game-tier fields: initial state, no prior knowledge yet", "level-tier fields: initial state, no prior knowledge yet"}
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
